data.title: Lush Life Hospitality Group Introduces Bull Moose, A Private Members' Cocktail Lounge And Cultural Salon, In Oyster Bay
data.description: In Oyster Bay, New York, on March 6th, 2026, Lush Life Hospitality Group has revealed the launch of Bull Moose, a members-only cocktail lounge and cultural sanctuary situated on Long Island's North Shore. Bull Moose has been designed as a cozy addition to the company's collection of dining establishments, offering a unique space for patrons to unwind and engage in thought-provoking conversations.

data.title: The Growing Link Between Glutathione and Cognitive Health (And How Continual-G Can Help)
data.description: A recent scientific review emphasizes the impact of cellular glutathione depletion on neurodegenerative diseases. Conducted in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, the review, published on March 6, 2026, underscores the connection between glutathione levels and these conditions. Numerous studies cited in the review highlight the significance of maintaining optimal glutathione levels to prevent neurodegenerative diseases. This research underscores the critical role of glutathione in combating these conditions and supports efforts to address cellular glutathione levels.

data.title: SYNEVIT® Addresses Hormonal Imbalance Ahead of National Endometriosis Awareness Month
data.description: Putting the focus on expert guidance and specialized supplements for aiding imbalanced hormones in women, the city of Fort Lauderdale, Florida saw an event on March 6, 2026. The importance of women's health has been highlighted in a recent McKinsey report presented at the J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference. The report emphasizes the need for tailored solutions to address hormonal imbalances in women, signaling a growing concern for this aspect of health.

data.title: New England Journal of Medicine publishes phase III ALLEGORY data showing Roche’s Gazyva/Gazyvaro significantly reduces disease activity in the most common form of lupus
data.description: Today in Basel, Roche disclosed that the results of the phase III ALLEGORY trial investigating Gazyva®/Gazyvaro® (obinutuzumab) for systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) were published in the New England Journal of Medicine. The study revealed that 76.7% of SLE patients treated with Gazyva/Gazyvaro plus standard therapy experienced at least a four-point improvement in SLE Responder Index 4 (SRI-4) at 52 weeks, compared to 53.5% with placebo plus standard therapy. The difference was statistically significant (23.1%, 95% CI: 12.5-33.6, p<0.001). These findings are also being presented at the SLEuro 2026 conference.

data.title: Winter Vitamin D Trend Spikes as Sunlight in the Northern Hemisphere Dips
data.description: A new product called SYNCADOL by SYNEVIT® is utilizing the "Sunshine Vitamin" to boost immunity and mood, aiming to uplift individuals seeking to improve their well-being. The supplement is designed to provide support during the challenging winter months, which often see a decline in mood due to reduced sunlight exposure. FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. – On March 6, 2026, it was announced through PRNewswire that SYNCADOL will offer consumers a natural way to enhance their spirits during February, known for being particularly gloomy. This innovative product aims to harness the power of Vitamin D to combat seasonal blues and promote overall health.

data.title: Coalition for Metabolic Health Applauds Congressional Guidance on Metabolic Health Research in FY 2026 Labor-HHS Appropriations Bill
data.description: On March 6, 2026, the Coalition for Metabolic Health praised the latest instructions from Congress, urging federal agencies to advance studies on metabolic interventions and nutritional strategies for chronic conditions such as diabetes, obesity, Alzheimer's disease. The guidance encourages increased research into developing effective treatments for these ailments. The coalition aims to address the growing prevalence of these diseases by focusing on innovative approaches to improve public health.

data.title: GCI Liberty, Inc. Announces 2026 Virtual Annual Meeting of Stockholders
data.description: GCI Liberty, Inc., located in Englewood, Colorado, has officially revealed that their Virtual Annual Meeting of Stockholders for the year 2026 is on the horizon. This meeting will provide an opportunity for stockholders to participate in key decision-making processes and discussions regarding the company's future. This event is crucial for stakeholders as they will be able to vote on important matters that will shape the direction of the company. The meeting will be held online, allowing for convenient attendance from various locations. Stockholders are encouraged to take part in this significant event that will influence the trajectory of GCI Liberty, Inc.

data.title: Liberty Broadband Corporation Announces 2026 Virtual Annual Meeting of Stockholders
data.description: Liberty Broadband Corporation, headquartered in Englewood, Colorado, recently revealed plans for its upcoming 2026 Virtual Annual Meeting of Stockholders. This meeting is a vital event where shareholders will convene to discuss pertinent company updates, financial insights, and strategic direction moving forward. The 2026 Annual Meeting serves as a crucial platform for Liberty Broadband Corporation to communicate with its investors, with the goal of ensuring transparency and alignment on future goals and initiatives. The virtual format of this meeting is designed to accommodate a larger audience base, aiming to engage a wide range of stakeholders. This event is expected to have a substantial impact on Liberty Broadband Corporation's future trajectory and is anticipated to draw significant interest from investors and analysts alike.

data.title: Douglas Elliman Inc. to Host Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results Conference Call
data.description: Douglas Elliman Inc. (NYSE: DOUG) has announced that they will be hosting a conference call and webcast to review their financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. The event is scheduled for Friday, March 13, 2026, beginning at 8:00 a.m. (ET). Interested investors can participate in the call through a live webcast accessible at https://join.eventcastplus.com/eventcastplus/douglas-elliman-inc-fourth-quarter-2025-earnings-call. It is recommended to log in at least 10 minutes prior to the start time. For those unable to join live, a replay of the call will be available shortly after it concludes on March 13.

data.title: Strax Networks Appoints Hall of Famer and Entrepreneur Frank Thomas as Strategic Advisor
data.description: Strax Networks Inc. is bolstering its enterprise growth strategy and brand leadership by expanding its AI infrastructure platform. The company, based in Sarasota, Florida, made the announcement on March 6, 2026. Strax Networks Inc. specializes in AI technology and aims to enhance physical environments with intelligent solutions. This move marks a significant step in the company's growth, solidifying its position as a leader in the industry.
